indexes.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX campaign_mailing_lists_pkey ON public.campaign_mailing_lists USING btree (campaign_id, mailing_list_id)

policies.policyname: Users can view own campaign records
policies.qual:
(campaign_id IN ( SELECT campaigns.id
   FROM campaigns
  WHERE (campaigns.created_by = auth.uid())))

policies.policyname: Users can manage own campaigns
policies.qual:
((created_by = auth.uid()) OR ((team_id IS NOT NULL) AND (team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
   FROM user_profiles
  WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))))

policies.policyname: Users can manage their campaign
Team members can view team contact cards
policies.qual:
(team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
   FROM user_profiles
  WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))

policies.policyname: Users can manage own contact cards
All users can view mail pieces
Users can manage records in own lists
policies.qual:
(mailing_list_id IN ( SELECT mailing_lists.id
   FROM mailing_lists
  WHERE ((mailing_lists.created_by = auth.uid()) OR ((mailing_lists.team_id IS NOT NULL) AND (mailing_lists.team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
           FROM user_profiles
          WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))))))

policies.policyname: Users can manage records of their lists
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM mailing_lists
  WHERE ((mailing_lists.id = mailing_list_records.mailing_list_id) AND (mailing_lists.created_by = auth.uid()))))

policies.policyname: Users can view records of their lists
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM mailing_lists
  WHERE ((mailing_lists.id = mailing_list_records.mailing_list_id) AND ((mailing_lists.created_by = auth.uid()) OR (mailing_lists.is_active = true)))))

policies.policyname: Users can manage tags on own lists
policies.qual:
(mailing_list_id IN ( SELECT mailing_lists.id
   FROM mailing_lists
  WHERE ((mailing_lists.created_by = auth.uid()) OR ((mailing_lists.team_id IS NOT NULL) AND (mailing_lists.team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
           FROM user_profiles
          WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))))))

policies.policyname: Users can view own list usage
Team members can view team mailing lists
policies.qual:
(team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
   FROM user_profiles
  WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))

policies.policyname: Users can create mailing lists
Users can delete their own mailing lists
Users can manage own mailing lists
policies.qual:
((created_by = auth.uid()) OR ((team_id IS NOT NULL) AND (team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
   FROM user_profiles
  WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))))

policies.policyname: Users can update their own mailing lists
Users can view their own mailing lists
Users can manage own orders
Users can manage their own orders
Users can view own record usage
policies.qual:
(campaign_id IN ( SELECT campaigns.id
   FROM campaigns
  WHERE (campaigns.created_by = auth.uid())))

policies.policyname: Users can manage own designs
policies.qual:
((user_id = auth.uid()) OR ((team_id IS NOT NULL) AND (team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
   FROM user_profiles
  WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))))

policies.policyname: All users can view system templates
All users can view tags
Users can create tags
Users can manage own tags
policies.qual:
((created_by = auth.uid()) OR ((team_id IS NOT NULL) AND (team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
   FROM user_profiles
  WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))))

policies.policyname: Team members can view teams
policies.qual:
(id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
   FROM user_profiles
  WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))

policies.policyname: Team owners can manage teams
Users can insert own profile
Users can update own profile
Users can update their own profile
Users can view own profile
Users can view their own profile
Users can manage own webhooks
policies.qual:
((user_id = auth.uid()) OR ((team_id IS NOT NULL) AND (team_id IN ( SELECT user_profiles.team_id
   FROM user_profiles
  WHERE (user_profiles.id = auth.uid())))))

triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER update_campaigns_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.campaigns FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER update_contact_cards_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.contact_cards FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER create_audit_log_trigger AFTER INSERT OR DELETE OR UPDATE ON public.mailing_list_records FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION create_audit_log_entry()
CREATE TRIGGER update_list_record_count AFTER INSERT OR DELETE OR UPDATE OF is_valid ON public.mailing_list_records FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_mailing_list_record_count()
CREATE TRIGGER update_mailing_list_record_count_trigger AFTER INSERT OR DELETE ON public.mailing_list_records FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_mailing_list_record_count()
CREATE TRIGGER update_mailing_list_records_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.mailing_list_records FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER update_mailing_lists_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.mailing_lists FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER update_saved_designs_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.saved_designs FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER update_teams_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.teams FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
CREATE TRIGGER update_vendors_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.vendors FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
